purpose: Progressively harder real tasks for validating the reliable coding agent loop.
promotionRules: Record relevant gates or an explicit skip reason.
Produce a plain shoshin report for success or blockage.
Avoid repeated high-token repairs without artifact progress.

rungs.name: Single-file utility page
rungs.userRequest: Make me a small offline page that stores and shows my entries.
rungs.successSignal: MODEL_DONE with passed static and browser gates, or quality_block with nextAction.

rungs.name: Multi-action single-file SPA
rungs.userRequest: Make a polished planner with add, delete, totals, empty state, and persistence.
rungs.successSignal: Report lists artifact, gates, sessions, tokens, and no unresolved quality block.

rungs.name: Scoped library implementation
rungs.userRequest: Add the calculation or classification logic inside this package only.
rungs.successSignal: MODEL_DONE only when implementation files change inside scope.

rungs.name: Existing-code bugfix
rungs.userRequest: This existing app has a failing behavior; fix the smallest path.
rungs.successSignal: Same failing assertion does not repeat indefinitely; report names the changed path.

rungs.name: Multi-file vanilla app
rungs.userRequest: Split the app into HTML, CSS, and JS while preserving behavior.
rungs.successSignal: Browser behavior passes with multiple linked local files.

rungs.name: Small API service
rungs.userRequest: Build a small local API with validation and tests.
rungs.successSignal: Compile/test gate passes without servers left running.

rungs.name: Fullstack persistence slice
rungs.userRequest: Build a tiny UI plus local persistence/API flow.
rungs.successSignal: Report explains both frontend and backend status.

rungs.name: Refactor with tests
rungs.userRequest: Improve this code without changing behavior.
rungs.successSignal: Tests pass and report describes changed implementation files.
